sanitizePathName.description: Convert arbitrary strings into valid JavaScript identifiers with configurable transformation rules

input.description: The string to sanitize (e.g., filename, path segment)

lowerFirst.description: Lowercase the first character of the first segment for camelCase convention
lowerFirst.behavior: When true: 'MyModule' → 'myModule'. When false: 'MyModule' → 'MyModule' (preserves original case)

examples.note: First segment 'parse' is lowercase from split, so unchanged

preserveAllUpper.description: Automatically preserve any SEGMENT that is already in all-uppercase format
preserveAllUpper.behavior: Checks each segment individually. If segment is ALL uppercase letters, preserve it unchanged. Does NOT require entire string to be uppercase.

examples.note: V2 behavior: Mixed becomes 'mixed' (not all-upper), APPS preserved (is all-upper)
V2 bug: Should lowercase 'common' but preserves as-is

preserveAllLower.description: Automatically preserve any SEGMENT that is already in all-lowercase format
preserveAllLower.behavior: Checks each segment individually. If segment is ALL lowercase letters, preserve it unchanged. Does NOT require entire string to be lowercase.

examples.note: V2: Mixed becomes 'mixed' (default behavior), apps preserved (is all-lower)

rules.description: Advanced segment transformation rules with glob pattern support

leave.description: Segments to preserve exactly as-is (case-sensitive matching, supports glob patterns)

leaveInsensitive.description: Segments to preserve exactly as-is (case-insensitive matching, supports glob patterns)

upper.description: Segments to force to UPPERCASE (supports glob patterns including **STRING** boundary patterns)

patternTypes.preSplit: Patterns match against original string before splitting (e.g., *-ip matches 'auto-ip')
patternTypes.boundary: **STRING** only matches when surrounded by other characters

examples.note: Pre-split pattern: *-ip matches original 'auto-ip', then 'ip' segment uppercased
Boundary pattern: json surrounded by other chars
Boundary pattern requires surrounding chars, standalone not matched

lower.description: Segments to force to lowercase (supports glob patterns including **STRING** boundary patterns)

patternTypes.preSplit: Patterns match against original string before splitting
patternTypes.boundary: **STRING** only matches when surrounded by other characters

splitBehavior.description: How the input string is split into segments
splitBehavior.explanation: Splits on anything that is NOT alphanumeric, underscore, or dollar sign

rulePrecedence.description: Order in which transformation rules are applied to each segment
order: 5. Pre-split pattern matching (upper/lower rules matching original string)
8. Default camelCase behavior (lowerFirst for first segment, uppercase first char for others)

v2Bugs.issue: preserveAllUpper doesn't preserve Mixed case correctly
v2Bugs.example: Mixed_APPS with preserveAllUpper returns 'mixed_APPS' instead of keeping Mixed capitalized or camelCasing to 'mixedAPPS'
v2Bugs.impact: Inconsistent case handling for mixed-case identifiers

v2Bugs.issue: Underscores always preserved, never converted to camelCase
v2Bugs.impact: No way to convert snake_case to camelCase
v2Bugs.note: This may be intentional - underscores are valid JS identifiers

v3Improvements.proposal: When preserveAllUpper is set, preserve each all-uppercase segment independently
